mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, email, phone, avatar, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, remark
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_tbl WHERE username LIKE #{keyword} OR real_name LIKE #{keyword}
SELECT FROM user_tbl ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_tbl (username, password, real_name, email, phone, avatar, status, create_by, update_by, remark) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_tbl SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_tbl WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_tbl WHERE username = #{username} AND id != #{id}
